tabby cat.label: 'M'-shaped forehead marking
tabby cat.description: Distinct dark tabular pattern centered between the eyes.

tabby cat.label: Pencil lines
tabby cat.description: Fine, dark horizontal stripes radiating from the lateral canthus across the cheeks.

tabby cat.label: Medial canthus highlighting
tabby cat.description: Dark, eyeliner-like pigmentation contouring the eyelids.

tabby cat.label: Vertical slit pupils
tabby cat.description: Narrow, elliptical pupil geometry indicative of ambush predators.

tabby cat.label: Green irises
tabby cat.description: Chlorophyll-colored pigmentation of the iris stroma.

tabby cat.label: Amber/Yellow irises
tabby cat.description: High-chroma carotenoid pigmentation of the iris.

tabby cat.label: Mystacial vibrissae
tabby cat.description: Prominent macro-whiskers extending horizontally from the muzzle.

tabby cat.label: Mystacial pads
tabby cat.description: Hypertrophied, fleshy tissue at the base of the vibrissae.

tabby cat.label: Pointed pinnae
tabby cat.description: Erect, triangular ear structures optimizing directional audition.

tabby cat.label: Ear tufts / Furnishings
tabby cat.description: Fine hair extensions emerging from the interior or apex of the pinnae.

tabby cat.label: Pink rhinarium
tabby cat.description: Exposed, hairless nose leather with light pink pigmentation.

tabby cat.label: Philtrum
tabby cat.description: Vertical sub-nasal groove bisecting the upper lip.

tabby cat.label: White mental region
tabby cat.description: Pale/white patch localized on the ventral surface of the jaw (chin).

tabby cat.label: Submental striping
tabby cat.description: Dark collar-like bands wrapping beneath the chin.

tabby cat.label: Nictitating membrane
tabby cat.description: Translucent third eyelid occasionally visible at the medial canthus.

tabby cat.label: Mackerel striping
tabby cat.description: Continuous, vertical narrow bars radiating downward from the spine.

tabby cat.label: Classic whorls
tabby cat.description: Concentric, bullseye-like circular patterns on the lateral flanks.

tabby cat.label: Agouti banding
tabby cat.description: Alternating light and dark melanin bands within individual hair shafts.

tabby cat.label: Ringed caudal markings
tabby cat.description: Distinct, alternating dark and light concentric bands along the tail.

tabby cat.label: Dark dorsal stripe
tabby cat.description: Solid, low-value longitudinal band tracing the vertebral column.

tabby cat.label: Ventral countershading
tabby cat.description: Significantly lighter/cream-colored fur covering the abdominal plane.

tabby cat.label: Torbie marbling
tabby cat.description: Patchwork co-occurrence of eumelanin (black/gray) and phaeomelanin (orange).

tabby cat.label: Guard hairs
tabby cat.description: Long, coarse, highly pigmented topcoat hairs providing structure.

tabby cat.label: Fleece undercoat
tabby cat.description: Short, dense, insulative downy fur layer beneath guard hairs.

tabby cat.label: Pectoral locket
tabby cat.description: Isolated white patch localized on the chest.

tabby cat.label: Spotted flanks
tabby cat.description: Fractured mackerel lines appearing as discrete, aligned spots.

tabby cat.label: Brindled pelage
tabby cat.description: Flecked, highly irregular distribution of dark and light agouti hairs.

tabby cat.label: High-contrast leg bars
tabby cat.description: Bold, horizontal stripes wrapping around the proximal limbs.

tabby cat.label: Melanistic tipping
tabby cat.description: Terminal dark pigmentation on individual hairs across the dorsum.

tabby cat.label: Rufous undertone
tabby cat.description: Warm, reddish-brown ground color of the under-pelage.

tabby cat.label: Digitigrade posture
tabby cat.description: Alignment where weight is borne on the phalanges rather than metatarsals.

tabby cat.label: Digital pads
tabby cat.description: Fleshy, shock-absorbing integumentary cushions beneath each toe.

tabby cat.label: Carpal pad
tabby cat.description: Isolated pad on the posterior surface of the forelimb (forearm).

tabby cat.label: Sheathed claws
tabby cat.description: Retracted keratinous ungual processes within distal phalangeal folds.

tabby cat.label: Dewclaw
tabby cat.description: Vestigial first digit located on the medial aspect of the forelimb.

tabby cat.label: Elongated caudal vertebrae
tabby cat.description: Flexible, tapered tail assembly used for counterbalancing.

tabby cat.label: Scapular ridge
tabby cat.description: Prominent, mobile shoulder blades visible during locomotion.

tabby cat.label: Pelvic limbs
tabby cat.description: Heavily muscled hind legs optimized for saltatorial (jumping) forces.

tabby cat.label: Thoracic limbs
tabby cat.description: Slender, articulate forelimbs designed for prey capture and manipulation.

tabby cat.label: Lumbar arch
tabby cat.description: Highly flexible spinal curvature enabled by loosely articulated vertebrae.

tabby cat.label: Sphinx / Loaf posture
tabby cat.description: Sternal recumbency with limbs completely tucked beneath the thorax.

tabby cat.label: Spinal flexion
tabby cat.description: Pronounced arching of the back, typical of defensive threat displays.

tabby cat.label: Lateral recumbency
tabby cat.description: Lying flat on the side, exposing the ventral abdomen and flank pattern.

tabby cat.label: Thoracic extension
tabby cat.description: Forward stretching of the front limbs while lowering the anterior torso.

tabby cat.label: Caudal curling
tabby cat.description: Tail tightly wrapped around the perimeter of a resting body.

tabby cat.label: Pinnae lateral flattening
tabby cat.description: "Airplane ears"—ears rotated downward and outward, indicating aversion.

tabby cat.label: Pinnae forward erection
tabby cat.description: Pinnae directed anteriorly, indicating focused attention/gaze lock.

tabby cat.label: Mydriasis
tabby cat.description: Highly dilated, circular pupils (indicative of low light or high arousal).

tabby cat.label: Distal white mittens
tabby cat.description: White depigmentation localized strictly to the paws.

tabby cat.label: Vibrissae protraction
tabby cat.description: Whiskers flared forward and outward during investigation or predation.
